response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates deep full-stack expertise with 13+ years of experience, including direct alignment with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java). His roles show consistent responsibility for end-to-end feature development, scalability, and user-focused delivery across enterprise and open-source projects, with measurable impact in high-throughput systems and AI-agent infrastructure.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with direct stack alignment (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB)
Strong background in scalable systems, cloud platforms (AWS), and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes)
Proven leadership in architecture decisions, performance optimization, and cross-team collaboration
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, a primary stack requirement
No direct experience with Vitest (testing framework) mentioned in resume
Recent industry experience (AI-agent work) may dilute focus from traditional full-stack roles

key_factors.factor: Full-stack seniority and direct stack alignment
